item.g:title: Maltamelon Juice
item.g:description: Specialized double melon press bringing together honeydew and red watermelons.

item.g:title: Strawberry Smoothie
item.g:description: Creamy sugar-free blend of hand-picked strawberries, Greek yogurt, and zero-calorie plant nectar.

item.g:title: Alphonso ripe
item.g:description: Origin - ratnagiri (carbide free) Premium alphanso ripe mango 1 dozen

item.g:title: Watermelon Punch
item.g:description: Exquisite fusion of crisp watermelon, dynamic mint undertone and fresh lime notes.

item.g:title: Mango Milkshake
item.g:description: Classic velvety rich milkshake crafted with pure mango pulp and cream.

item.g:title: Kiwi Cold Wave
item.g:description: Slightly tart, vitamin-heavy green kiwi press with sweet apple base tones.

item.g:title: Peach Ice Tea
item.g:description: Brewed mountain black tea leaves chilled over fresh peach puree chunks and mint.

item.g:title: Mango Matcha
item.g:description: Stunning layer of organic stoneground Japanese matcha whisked over fresh sweet mango nectar.

item.g:title: Pomegranate Paloma
item.g:description: High antioxidant deep crimson ruby pomegranate arils pressed cold with a twist of lime.

item.g:title: Fresh Pineapple Juice
item.g:description: Lively tropical pineapple elixir cold-squeezed to maintain dietary enzymes and bright flavor.

item.g:title: Fresh Orange Juice
item.g:description: Sun-golden Nagpur oranges pressed cold with pulp particles for a full spectrum sweet and tangy experience.

item.g:title: Jamun Shikanji
item.g:description: Traditional cooling lemonade enriched with seasonal black plum (jamun) pulp and rock salts.

item.g:title: Coco Drip
item.g:description: Indulgent coconut milk chocolate milkshake crafted with premium cocoa and coconut bits.

item.g:title: Grapes Glow
item.g:description: Anti-ageing deep black grape juice cold-pressed to release skin-loving resveratrol.

item.g:title: Wheatgrass Juice
item.g:description: Raw living chlorophyll shot of fresh tender wheatgrass, cold-pressed with touch of sweet apple.

item.g:title: Mango Smoothie
item.g:description: Creamy whipped Alphonso mango pulp blended with unsweetened organic almond milk.

item.g:title: Raw Jackfruit Chunks
item.g:description: ALL FRUITS AND VEGETABLE ARE CUT AND PEELED IN CONTROLED AND HYGENIC ENVIROMENT AND IT IS PREPARED WITH IN 60 MIN OF DELIVERY TIME

item.g:title: Premium Goldenberry
item.g:description: Organic and Super Sweet, Sourced Directly From Ooty

item.g:title: Gulabo Litchi
item.g:description: Sensational fragrant rose petal preserve (gulkand) layered with sweet white litchi premium nectar.

item.g:title: Coconut Kulukki
item.g:description: Famous shaken coconut water with sweet basil seeds (sabja), crushed ginger and green chili slice.

item.g:title: Super Sattu
item.g:description: High-protein roasted gram flour energy drink spiced with mint, green chili, chat masala and cold spring water.

item.g:title: Aam Panna
item.g:description: Traditional roasted green mango drink flavored with cumin, black salt and mint leaves.

item.g:title: Fresh Watermelon Juice
item.g:description: Pure hydraulic pressure extraction from sun-ripened red watermelons. Ultimate crisp freshness.

item.g:title: Green Goodness
item.g:description: Nutrient-packed juice of spinach, mint, cucumber, celery, kiwi and green apple.

item.g:title: Kokum Katira
item.g:description: Tangy Konkan kokum fruit skin infusion blended with natural cooling tragacanth gum (gond katira).

item.g:title: ABC Juice
item.g:description: The classic miracle elixir: Fresh Apple, vibrant Beetroot, and young Carrot. High-performance detox.

item.g:title: Moringa Avocado Smoothie
item.g:description: Extreme green boost: organic moringa leaves, creamy avocado, and ripe naturally sweet banana.

item.g:title: Kesar Badam Thandai
item.g:description: Rich traditional royal beverage loaded with saffron, almonds, fennel seeds, and cardamoms.

item.g:title: Fresh Tender Coconut
item.g:description: Naturally sweet, fat-free raw hydration extracted fresh from selected coastal water coconuts.

item.g:title: Coconut Matcha
item.g:description: Ceremonial Uji Japanese green matcha whisked directly over chilled sweet coconut water & tender coconut meat pulp.

item.g:title: Fresh Apple Juice
item.g:description: Rich sweet nectar extracted from selected crisp Kashmir Red Apples. 100% natural oxidization-guarded.

item.g:title: Mango Sticky Rice
item.g:description: Traditional sweet Thai dessert drink: layered rich coconut milk cream, pandan, sticky rice essence and pure mango pulp.

item.g:title: Mix Fruits Bowl
item.g:description: MIX ITEM LIKE PINEAPPLE, GUAVA, GRAPES, APPLE, MUSKMELON, ORANGE (WITH CHAT MASALA)

item.g:title: Muskmelon Kesar Smoothie
item.g:description: Thick musk melon base infused with finest saffron (kesar) strands without any added sugar.

item.g:title: Green Peas Frozen Hand Peeled
item.g:description: 1Kg Pack Keep Frozen -18°c Can Be Used Till 6 Months

item.g:title: HAND PEELED GARLIC 100 GM
item.g:description: ALL FRUITS AND VEGETABLE ARE CUT AND PEELED IN CONTROLED AND HYGENIC ENVIROMENT AND IT IS PREPARED WITH IN 60 MIN OF DELIVERY TIME

item.g:title: Cherry Vanilla Cloud
item.g:description: Sweet dark red cherries cold pressed and blended with natural Madagascar vanilla pods.

item.g:title: Hand Peeled Sweet Corn
item.g:description: 1Kg pack keep frozen -18°c can be used till 6 months

item.g:description: Origin - karnataka Alphanso mango 1kg Carbide Free
